description: Trends come & go but basics never go out of style. Our oversized basics are made for Indian men and climate. Our t-shirts are comfortable, neither too baggy nor too slim, crafted in premium breathable fabric to help you look your best, feel your best and be your best. Garmi nahi lagegi aur premium tareeke se fall bhi karegi!
description_text:
This oversized tee features a relaxed fit and cool dropped shoulders, crafted from soft, breathable cotton that drapes just right.
It's your go-to for effortless vibes, perfect for any casual occasion from chilling at home to hitting the streets.
Pair it with some baggy cargo pants and your fave kicks for an ultimate streetwear look, or layer it up for a transitional fit.

description_text:
Okay, but this tee is giving major chill vibes.
It's got that perfect oversized fit with dropped shoulders and a cool textured, striped knit.
Perfect for a sunny day out or just lounging around, making it a go-to for everyday wear.
Pair it with your fave cargo shorts or baggy jeans and some fresh kicks for an effortlessly cool look.

product_name: Men Embroidered Detail Acrylic Relaxed Pullover
description_text:
Channel those main character energy vibes without even trying.
This relaxed fit pullover features a classic crew neck and cool raglan sleeves, crafted from a cozy knit acrylic.
It's perfect for chill transitional weather, whether you're grabbing coffee or hitting a late-night hangout.
Pair it with your fav baggy jeans and fresh kicks for an instantly fire fit.

description_text:
Calling all cozy crew, this pullover is your ticket to festive feels.
It's got a comfy regular fit with a classic round neck and ribbed details, so you can chill hard.
Perfect for layering up in winter, this one's a total vibe for all your casual holiday parties or just lounging at home.
Just throw it on with some distressed denim and your go-to sneakers, and you're good to go.

description: Fitted vest top in viscose jersey with a round neckline and a diagonal seam with gathers at the front for a draped effect. Asymmetrical hem.
vibes: statement piece, date night, night luxe
description_text:
Obsessed with this top that screams main character energy.
It's a fitted, draped jersey vest with a super chic asymmetrical hem.
Perfect for your next date night or a night out with the squad, especially when the weather's warm.
Pair it with some high-waisted tailored trousers or a mini skirt and your favorite chunky accessories for a snatched look.

description: Refresh your casual lineup with these off-white cargo pants from Nuon. Made from pure cotton with a soft corduroy texture, they’re tailored in a relaxed fit and mid-rise waist that promise all-day comfort. The elasticated waistband offers easy movement, while multiple flap pockets lend utility and structure.
description_text:
Ready to level up your chill fits?
These off-white corduroy pants boast a comfy relaxed fit with a mid-rise waist, designed for ultimate laid-back vibes.
Perfect for flexing daily, these pants are your go-to for any casual occasion, all year round.
Pair 'em with a crisp tee or an oversized hoodie and your freshest kicks for an effortless street-style moment.

description_text:
Get ready to level up your sneaker game with these seriously cool retro trainers.
Crafted with a soft suede-like upper, they feature a classic silhouette with contrast details and a comfy track sole.
Perfect for adding a laid-back, vintage vibe to your everyday casual fits, no matter the season.
Pair them with baggy jeans and an oversized tee for a chill street style look, or some tailored trousers for an unexpected twist.
garment_summary_front:
{"raw":"[TECH_PACK]
**Cover Material & Finish**: Heavy-nap split cowhide suede with a matte, fibrous finish. Contrast overlays (side stripe and heel tab) in smooth-grain polyurethane or corrected grain leather with a satin sheen.
**Sole Construction**: Low-profile cemented rubber unit with a vintage-style toe bumper wrap. The outsole features a textured traction pattern, likely a waffle or herringbone derivative, visible at the toe curve.
**Toe Box Shape**: Unstructured, amygdaloid (almond) toe profile with low vertical volume.
**Shaft & Collar**: Low-top silhouette (sub-malleolar). Soft, unstructured collar with visible cream textile lining.
**Closure System**: Central lacing system with 6 pairs of raw, punched eyelets (no metal grommets). Flat, woven cotton laces in a contrasting ecru shade.
**Surface Texture & Stitching**: The primary texture is soft and velvety due to the suede nap. Stitching is tonal on the brown suede panels (single needle) and tonal on the cream overlays.
**Rigidity & Form**: Highly malleable and deconstructed. The upper lacks a rigid toe puff or stiff heel counter, suggesting a "soft" collapsible fit intended for casual wear rather than performance stability.
**Color (hex codes)**:
*   Upper: Deep Chocolate/Espresso [#4E3B31]
*   Details (Laces/Stripe/Sole): Ecru/Cream [#F0EAD6] and Translucent Gum Brown [#6F4E37]
**Branding**: Minimalist exterior; devoid of overt lateral logos. Branding is likely confined to the insole and tongue label (not visible in this angle).
**Hardware & Embellishments**: Hardware-free construction (no aglets or eyelets visible). The primary embellishment is the retro-inspired lateral "V" or stripe overlay.

[SHOE_PHYSICS]
Presented in a relaxed, front-facing orientation, the silhouette exhibits a deconstructed, low-volume profile characteristic of 1970s track footwear, modernized with a luxury "soft-wear" construction. The primary upper, crafted from napped split suede, absorbs ambient light, creating a matte, velvety depth in a deep chocolate hue, which is sharply contrasted by the higher albedo of the smooth, cream-colored leather overlays and flat cotton laces. The material physics suggest high pliability; the vamp and quarter panels appear to drape rather than hold a rigid form, indicating the absence of internal stiffeners or heavy backing. The rubber outsole, rendered in a semi-translucent gum tone, wraps organically over the toe tip, providing a friction point that disrupts the suede's texture while anchoring the shoe's vintage aesthetic. description: These high-rise jeans have that perfect lived-in feel, making them the kind of denim you’ll reach for on repeat. Cut in a straight-leg, they have a classic silhouette that coordinates with everything, from sleek bodysuits and tucked in knits to oversized hoodies and tees.
description_text:
Ready to level up your denim game with that perfect lived-in feel?
These high-rise straight jeans feature a cool ombré wash that's giving all the street style energy, designed to hug you just right without being too tight.
They're totally versatile for any season, making them your go-to for everything from casual hangs to low-key flexing.
Style 'em with a cropped top and chunky sneakers for an effortless vibe, or throw on some sleek heels and a bodysuit for a night out.

ITEM_NAME: KARL LAGERFELD JEANS - OMBRE HIGH RISE STRAIGHT JEANS

[GARMENT_PHYSICS]
Frontal analysis of the garment reveals a pair of heavyweight, structured denim jeans defined by a dramatic ombré wash. The material physics suggest a rigid or low-stretch composition, as the fabric maintains a tubular shape through the leg without clinging to the knee or calf. The surface texture transitions from a matte, saturated black at the waist and high hip into a textured, speckled grey twill weave starting at the upper thigh, creating a two-tone visual effect. The fit is high-rise, securely hugging the waist and upper pelvis before falling in a straight, vertical line from the widest part of the hip to the hem. Gravity causes the fabric to hang with stiff, straight drape lines, showing minimal folding or stacking except for a slight break where the hem hits the instep. Hardware details include a central silver-tone shank button at the closure and matching silver rivets reinforcing the stress points of the curved front scoop pockets. A signature blue woven tab is stitched to the coin pocket on the wearer's right side.

It rocks an oversized fit with cool dropped shoulder sleeves and a longline cut for that extra relaxed feel.
Perfect for year-round wear, making it an essential for your everyday rotation.
Pair it with some baggy denim or comfy shorts and your fave sneakers.

description: Shirt in Oxford cotton with a button-down collar, classic front, yoke at the back and an open chest pocket. Long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a sleeve placket with a link button. Gently rounded hem. Regular fit for comfortable wear and a classic silhouette.
description_text:
This regular-fit Oxford shirt is all about that comfy, breathable vibe, with crisp vertical stripes and a classic button-down collar.
It's perf for those smart casual meetups or just leveling up your everyday fit, no matter the season.
Pair it with some chinos and fresh kicks for an effortlessly cool look that's totally on point.

description:
Curved Comfort, Bold Contrast – Relaxed, Unisex, and Effortlessly Elevated

These Contrast Curve Baggy Joggers bring a fresh twist to everyday comfort with a roomy silhouette that flows with ease yet stands out with sculpted curve-panel detailing. Designed with a mid-rise fit and full-length drape, they blend streetwear volume with refined structure. The soft suiting fabric moves fluidly, giving the joggers a premium feel while maintaining that relaxed, unisex edge.
description_text:
Ready to flex your style game with zero effort?
These baggy joggers feature a relaxed, wide-leg fit with cool contrast curve paneling that brings all the futuristic vibes.
Perfect for catching flights, chilling at home, or hitting up that new pop-up, they're truly an all-season staple.
Pair them with your chunkiest sneakers and a cropped tee for an instant street-style win.

description_text:
Elevate your vibe with these super sleek Chelsea boots.
They feature a sharp pointed toe, smooth faux-patent finish, and classic elastic side panels for a snug fit.
Perfect for adding a touch of edge to any season's fit, whether it's for a night out or a dressed-up day look.
Pair them with tailored trousers or a mini skirt for an instant style upgrade that slays.

description_text:

These classic sneakers feature a comfortable, roomy toe box and a sleek low-profile silhouette with a smooth body and a suede-like toe detail.
Perfect for rocking year-round, these are your go-to for any casual hangout or street-style moment.
Pair 'em with some baggy denim or a cute midi skirt and a graphic tee for an effortlessly cool fit.

Pair them with a cute crop top and your fave sandals for an effortlessly cool look.

description: Slingback shoes with a patent effect. Stiletto heel. Metal detail on the front. Elasticated back strap. Pointed toe.
vibes: quiet luxury, office siren, date night
description_text:
Obsessed with that clean girl aesthetic? These slingbacks are your next major flex.
They feature a sleek pointed toe and a chic stiletto heel, giving you that 'put-together' vibe with a patent finish.
Perfect for boss babe moments in the office or making a statement on your next date night, all year round.
Pair them with tailored trousers or a slip dress and a micro bag for a look that screams quiet luxury.
garment_summary_front:
{"raw":"**Cover Material & Finish**: High-gloss patent finish (likely polyurethane or corrected grain leather) in a monochromatic nude/beige tone. The surface is non-porous, highly reflective, and smooth.

**Sole Construction**: Cemented construction with a low-profile, thin resin or thunit outsole in a tonal beige. The edge is finished clean with no visible welt stitching.

**Toe Box Shape**: Elongated, acutely pointed toe box with a low profile height, tapering sharply from the metatarsal area.

**Shaft & Collar**: Deeply cut vamp (décolleté) exposing the instep. The collar transitions into a slender slingback strap that wraps around the calcaneus.

**Closure System**: Slip-on entry secured by a fixed-length slingback strap, likely incorporating a concealed medial elastic gore for tension and fit retention.

**Surface Texture & Stitching**: The upper is uniformly smooth and glassy. Stitching is tonal and minimal, primarily visible along the topline binding and the perimeter of the decorative buckle.

**Rigidity & Form**: The toe box is highly structured and rigid (reinforced with a toe puff) to maintain the sharp point. The midfoot and strap are flexible. The heel is a rigid, centered kitten heel.

**Color (hex codes)**:
*   Upper: #EACFB8 (Pale Nude/Blush)
*   Outsole Edge: #Cfbda9 (Darker Beige)
*   Lining: #F2E3D5 (Light Cream)

**Branding**: Debossed logo on the heel seat of the insole (tonal).

**Hardware & Embellishments**: A prominent, oversized rectangular buckle positioned across the vamp. The buckle is "self-covered" (wrapped in the same patent material as the upper) and features a padded, pillow-like dimension, devoid of metallic exposure.

***

description: Short dress in jersey with a foldover at the top, fitted bodice and a flared skirt.
vibes: date night, night luxe, statement piece
description_text:
Feeling like you need a fresh vibe for your next night out?
This off-the-shoulder jersey dress features a flattering fit-and-flare silhouette and a mini length, perfectly hugging your figure.
It's perfect for a transitional season date night or a fun party with your besties.
Pair it with some chunky platform heels and a mini shoulder bag to complete the look.

**Material Physics:** Medium-weight jersey knit or soft crepe blend with high pliability and moderate elasticity. The fabric demonstrates fluid drape characteristics, particularly in the skirt's movement, while maintaining enough structural integrity to support the neckline band without sagging.

**Surface Micro-Texture:** Smooth, matte finish with a very fine gauge knit structure. No visible sheen or distinct weave pattern; the surface appears soft and uniform, absorbing light rather than reflecting it.

**Neckline Construction:** Off-the-shoulder (Bardot) style featuring a wide, folded self-fabric band (approximately 2.5 to 3 inches in width) that encircles the upper torso and arms. The band creates a straight horizontal line across the chest.

**Closure:** No visible closure mechanisms on the front aspect (likely pull-on or concealed side/back zipper).

**Sleeve:** The off-the-shoulder band functions as a cap sleeve, resting on the upper deltoids and leaving the shoulders and clavicles fully exposed. There is no separate armhole seam; the sleeve is integrated into the neckline band.

**Waistline Construction:** Features a distinct waist seam separating the bodice from the skirt. The seam sits near the natural waistline, though the bodice fabric blousons slightly over the seam, suggesting a relaxed fit through the torso.

**Hemline (length & style):** Mini length, falling to the mid-thigh. The hem is a simple, clean-finished turn-back hem. The skirt flares out, creating a loose, undulating edge.

**Fit Silhouette:** Fit-and-flare (skater) silhouette. The bodice is semi-fitted, tapering to the waist, releasing into a voluminous, A-line skirt.

**Color (hex codes):** Deep Burgundy / Maroon (Approx. #4E1820)

**Pattern Design:** Solid, monochromatic application.

**Peculiar Notes:** The bodice exhibits slight transverse draping/folding just above the waist seam, indicating the fabric is not pulled taut against the torso. The neckline band appears continuous without visible front seams.

description: Trainers in cotton canvas with lacing at the front and a loop at the back. Canvas linings and insoles and rubber soles that are patterned underneath.
description_text:
These trainers are giving major chill vibes for real.
They feature a classic low-top silhouette with a breathable cotton canvas upper and a secure lace-up front.
Perfect for your everyday grind or just chilling out on a sunny day.
Pair 'em with some baggy jeans and a cropped tee for an effortless, cool-girl look.
garment_summary_front:
{"raw":"[TECH_PACK]
**Cover Material & Finish**: Heavyweight cotton duck canvas with a coarse, visible cross-hatch weave; matte finish with natural fiber irregularity.
**Sole Construction**: Vulcanized rubber cupsole with a textured, vertically-ribbed toe bumper and smooth sidewall.
**Toe Box Shape**: Symmetrical, rounded almond toe; unstructured soft-toe construction (no rubber toe cap).
**Shaft & Collar**: Low-top profile; collar and throat edges finished with a folded self-fabric bias binding.
**Closure System**: 7-hole lacing system; flat, white woven cotton laces (approx. 8mm width); central canvas lace-keeper loop stitched to the tongue.
**Surface Texture & Stitching**: High-texture woven textile surface; tonal beige stitching throughout—double-needle stitching along the eyestay/facing, single-needle topstitch on the binding and tongue loop.
**Rigidity & Form**: Pliable, non-rigid upper conforming to foot shape; structured base provided by the rubber outsole; tension-based form held by lacing.
**Color (hex codes)**: Upper: Khaki Beige (#C2B295); Laces/Sole: Optic White (#FFFFFF); Hardware: Polished Silver (#C0C0C0); Lining: White (#F5F5F5).
**Branding**: Sterile/Minimalist aesthetic; no visible external branding or logos on the vamp or tongue.
**Hardware & Embellishments**: Fourteen polished silver-tone metal eyelets (nickel finish).

[SHOE_PHYSICS]
The silhouette presents a classic, low-profile plimsoll architecture characterized by a streamlined, narrow waist and a gently rounded toe box. The visual weight is grounded by the matte, light-absorbing quality of the heavyweight khaki canvas, which contrasts sharply with the high-value brightness of the optic white laces and rubber foxing. The textile upper suggests high pliability and breathability, showing subtle undulations around the throat that indicate a soft, unstructured build. Light interacts minimally with the coarse weave of the fabric, creating micro-shadows within the texture, while specular highlights are exclusively reserved for the polished silver eyelets. The flat cotton laces create a horizontal tension ladder across the instep, compressing the padded tongue and pulling the double-stitched facings inward to secure the fit. The construction relies on the vulcanized rubber sole for basal rigidity, while the upper remains flexible and adaptive.","item_name":null,"tech_pack":"[TECH_PACK]

description: Designed for comfort that looks sharp, these light brown corduroy trousers from Nuon are a modern wardrobe staple. Crafted from a soft cotton-blend fabric, they combine structure with ease. The mid-rise waist, button fastening, and multiple pockets ensure functionality, while the fine cord texture adds warmth and depth.
product_name: Light Brown Relaxed-Fit Mid-Rise Corduroy Trousers
description_text:
Ready to level up your everyday fit with some serious comfort and style?
These Nuon trousers rock a relaxed, straight-leg silhouette with a chill mid-rise waist, all crafted from that iconic soft, ribbed corduroy.
They're perfect for transitional weather, making them your go-to for chill hangouts or just vibing at home.
Pair 'em with a chunky knit, an oversized graphic tee, or a fresh pair of kicks for an effortlessly cool look.

garment_summary_back:
{"raw":"[TECH_PACK]
Material_Physics: Medium-weight corduroy with visible vertical wales; offers soft structural drape that holds the wide-leg shape while collapsing slightly at the shoe break.
Rear_Construction: Utility/Carpenter style construction; features a straight rear block without a traditional denim V-yoke, relying on the high-rise waistband for structural anchoring.
Waistband_Rear: Standard waistband with evenly spaced belt loops, including a center-back loop; clean finish without visible puckering.
Rear_Pockets: Two large, square patch pockets positioned high on the seat; wearer's left side features a functional carpenter's hammer loop extending from the side seam to the pocket, plus an additional patch utility pocket on the upper thigh.
Leg_Shape: Wide, relaxed straight cut that falls vertically from the widest point of the hip to the hem without tapering.
Hem: Standard single-needle topstitched hem; exhibits a slight break where the fabric rests on the footwear.
Fit: Relaxed fit with generous ease through the seat, crotch, and thighs for unrestricted movement.
Color: Uniform light brown/taupe.
Stitching: Tonal stitching throughout, blending seamlessly with the corduroy texture.
Labels: No exterior waistband patches or branding visible.
ITEM_NAME: Nuon Light Brown Relaxed Fit Mid Rise Corduroy Trousers

[GEOMETRY_SKELETON]
The rear silhouette forms a tall, rectangular column divided by the vertical center seam. The top boundary is a horizontal arc representing the waistband. Below this, the seat forms a gentle convex curve that transitions into straight vertical parallel lines defining the wide legs. The geometry includes superimposed rectangles for the rear patch pockets and the thigh utility pocket, and a semi-circular loop projection on the left hip.

[GARMENT_PHYSICS]
A direct REAR view of a volumetric shell rendered in textured corduroy. The fabric surface is defined by vertical parallel ridges (wales) that catch the light, creating micro-shadows. The rear waistband is the highest point and forms a solid arc, anchoring the straight drape of the fabric. The material falls with significant ease over the glutes, avoiding tight contours, and descends into a columnar shape. The hammer loop on the left adds a looped, gravity-dependent structural element.
